name: Fractured Staff of Armadyl
hoverSummary: Tier 95 two-handed magic staff with 1368 ability damage and 2765 accuracy.
detailLines: Two-handed magic weapon with 6-tick speed and range 8.
Special attack: Instability costs 50% adrenaline, deals 120%-140% ability damage, and applies the Instability buff for 30 seconds.
While Instability is active, qualifying magic critical strikes fire a non-recursive Lightning Surge 1 tick later for 70%-90% ability damage.
implementationNotes: Curated endgame magic 2h staff from the live Fractured Staff of Armadyl page. Wiki-verified with Playwright for tier, damage, accuracy, speed, special attack, and current Lightning Surge behavior.
